question: Ethereum Up or Down - January 19, 7PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the ETH/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the ETH/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/ETH_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance ETH/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Series Aurora Gaming Rounds Handicap (-3.5) vs GamerLegion (+3.5)
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Aurora Gaming and GamerLegion in the IEM Krakow Play-In, scheduled for January 28 at 6:00AM ET.

If Aurora Gaming defeats GamerLegion by 4 or more rounds across all Matchs in this match, this market will resolve to "Aurora Gaming".

Otherwise, it will resolve to "GamerLegion".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: Map Handicap: MIBR (-1.5) vs Legacy (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Legacy and MIBR in the BetBoom RUSH B! Summit Playoffs, scheduled for January 17 at 8:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "MIBR" if MIBR wins 2 or more maps than Legacy in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Legacy".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Legacy vs MIBR (BO3) - BetBoom RUSH B! Summit Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Legacy and MIBR in the BetBoom RUSH B! Summit Playoffs, scheduled for January 17 at 8:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Legacy" if Legacy win the match against MIBR.

This market will resolve to "MIBR" if MIBR win the match against Legacy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.sofascore.com/esports.

question: Series: REKONIX Kill Handicap (-3.5) vs PlayTime (+3.5)
description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between PlayTime and REKONIX in the ESL One Birmingham: Southeast Asia Closed Qualifier Playoffs, scheduled for January 17 at 11:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "REKONIX" if REKONIX secures 4 or more kills than PlayTime in the match. 

Otherwise, it will resolve to "PlayTime".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Spread: South Florida Bulls (-6.5)
description:
In the upcoming CBB game, scheduled for January 18 at 2:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "South Florida Bulls" if the South Florida Bulls win the game by 7 or more points.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Wichita State Shockers". 

The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

question: Series: Hanwha Life Esports Kill Handicap (-20.5) vs Nongshim Red Force (+20.5)
description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Nongshim Red Force and Hanwha Life Esports in the LCK Cup Group Stage, scheduled for January 18 at 3:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Hanwha Life Esports" if Hanwha Life Esports secures 21 or more kills than Nongshim Red Force in the match. 

Otherwise, it will resolve to "Nongshim Red Force".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.
groupItemTitle: Series: Hanwha Life Esports Kill Handicap (-20.5) vs Nongshim Red Force (+20.5)

events.title: LoL: Nongshim Red Force vs Hanwha Life Esports (BO3) - LCK Cup Group Stage
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Nongshim Red Force" if Nongshim Red Force win against Hanwha Life Esports in the named LoL match in the LCK Cup Group Stage, scheduled for January 18 at 3:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Hanwha Life Esports" if Hanwha Life Esports win against Nongshim Red Force in the LoL match.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.

If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/leagueoflegends/Main_Page.

description:

This market will resolve to "Ursa" if Ursa win the match against WATERMELON.

This market will resolve to "WATERMELON" if WATERMELON win the match against Ursa.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: Wichita State Shockers vs. South Florida Bulls: O/U 157.5
description:
In the upcoming CBB game, scheduled for January 18 at 2:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Wichita State Shockers and South Florida Bulls combine to score 158 or more points in this game.

If the combined total is less than 158, this market will resolve to "Under".

The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

question: Total Rounds Over/Under 51.5
description:
This market refers to the Valorant match between Pcific Esports and BBL Esports in the VCT EMEA Kickoff Playoffs, scheduled for January 21 at 11:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of rounds across all maps in this match is greater than or equal to 52.

Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

events.title: Valorant: Pcific Esports vs BBL Esports (BO3) - VCT EMEA Kickoff Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the Valorant match between Pcific Esports and BBL Esports in the VCT EMEA Kickoff Playoffs, scheduled for January 21 at 11:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Pcific Esports" if Pcific Esports win the match against BBL Esports.

This market will resolve to "BBL Esports" if BBL Esports win the match against Pcific Esports.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/valorant/Main_Page.
